scripts.test:spec: cd crates/flux-md-core && CMARK_MIN_PASS=652 cargo test --release --test cmark_spec -- --nocapture
scripts.test:gfm: cd crates/flux-md-core && GFM_MIN_PASS=23 cargo test --release --test gfm_spec -- --nocapture
scripts.deploy: bun run build:wasm && bun run build:web && sudo rm -rf /var/www/md.hsingh.app/* && sudo cp -r web/dist/. /var/www/md.hsingh.app/ && sudo chown -R caddy:caddy /var/www/md.hsingh.app && echo deployed
